Title: Carrie Placer Mine Plan of Operations - Environmental Assessment
nepa_prepared_by__c: BLM Owyhee Field Office - Kara Kirkpatrick-Kreitinger
nepa_document_summary__c: Environmental Assessment for DOI-BLM-ID-B030-2019-0014-EA. Analyzes impacts on Jordan Creek water quality redband trout habitat sage-grouse PHMA Columbia spotted frog riparian zone and mule deer crucial winter range.

Title: Finding of No Significant Impact - Carrie Placer Mine
nepa_prepared_by__c: BLM Owyhee Field Office - Forrest Griggs and Colleen Trese
nepa_document_summary__c: FONSI confirming no significant impact under Alternative A with required design features: 50-foot Jordan Creek buffer silt fencing steep-shoreline pond design seasonal mining window March 1 - November 30 and full reclamation bond.

Title: Decision Record - Carrie Placer Mine Plan of Operations
nepa_prepared_by__c: BLM Owyhee Field Office - Field Manager
nepa_document_summary__c: Decision Record approving Alternative A for the Carrie Placer Mine Plan of Operations with full suite of required design features. Signed by BLM Owyhee Field Manager November 27 2019.

Title: Affected Environment and Environmental Consequences Summary - Carrie Placer Mine
nepa_prepared_by__c: BLM Owyhee Field Office Interdisciplinary Team
nepa_document_summary__c: Summary of affected resources documenting baseline conditions across all seven resource disciplines: hydrology/water quality wildlife geology/soils and botanical/cultural resources.

Title: Section 106 Tribal Consultation Certification - Shoshone-Paiute Tribes
nepa_prepared_by__c: Kara Kirkpatrick-Kreitinger - BLM Owyhee Field Office
nepa_document_summary__c: Certification of completed government-to-government Section 106 NHPA consultation with Shoshone-Paiute Tribes. No historic properties affected determination.
